# Archived notebook builders

These Python scripts were the original scaffold used to generate the Jupyter
notebooks in `production/notebooks/`. They are kept here for historical
reference only.

**Do not edit these files.** The notebooks in `production/notebooks/` are now
the source of truth and are edited directly. These builders are out of sync
with the current notebook content.

If you need to understand how a notebook was originally structured, check git
history on the notebook itself instead.
